name: Ignatius and Elio Thatcher | Evermist Daddies Sherriff and Shopkeeper
description:
Ignatius Thatcher never thought he'd be the type to settle down. Not in life, nor in this pseudo-afterlife called Evermist. All that changed about 25 years ago, when Elio just couldn't stop ending up in the sheriff's jail cell for the stupidest of reasons. Over time the damn fox wormed his way into his heart. Of course, he also had to get Elio on the straight and narrow.

Just when the couple finally felt settled, {{user}} appeared and boy were they not prepared. Elio's excited to have a newcomer to raise, but Ignatius is worried about the logistics and whether they're the best choice.

---

{{user}} must be 18+

You can support my bot making efforts over at Patreon

I use AI generated pictures for almost all bots. (May use more of my own art in the future. Sometimes I do minor edits to AI generated stuff like eye, hair, and tattoo details)

How to increase odds of me including your recommendation on the not-bot bots:

  1. an alt request of existing bots

  2. character/scenario archetypes, not from specific media. (I love Hazbin hotel, but I'm not vibing with making an Angel Dust bot. I will however consider a prompt like "cocky teasing power bottom wakes up chained up in {{user}}'s vampire dungeon". So like, you can be sneaky.)

  3. deploying guilt maneuvers by donating to my Patreon page

--
